{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forged dragon-claws
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Forged dragon-claws]] are used to blast Cha’tur’niak.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c38">''Waybound'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
